instruction.title: Implementation Roadmap & Quality Control Gateways
instruction.overview: This document outlines the step-by-step build phases, quality assurance gateways, compilation checklists, and pre-launch validation tests.

phase.name: Foundation & Setup
phase.action: Configure directory structure inside the Next.js workspace.
Preload Inter and JetBrains Mono local font files inside layout.tsx.
Define CSS tokens variables inside global styles (globals.css).
Create modular, standalone icon components from SVGs.

phase.name: Primitive Elements
phase.action: Create Section and Container layout controls.
Implement the Button element (styles: primary, secondary, link).
Build the Card primitive with hover transitions.
Implement the static Badge chip indicator.

phase.name: Composite Components
phase.action: Create composite layout cards: FAQCard and TestimonialCard.
Build navigation header templates (Navbar desktop links).
Build pricing selector cards: BillingSwitch and CurrencySelector.
Build PricingCard presentation components.

phase.name: Layout Sections & Page Assembly
phase.action: Assemble static sections: Hero, Problem, Solution, FeatureShowcase, Testimonials, Footer.
Construct the grid container layouts for BentoGrid.
Establish the Client Component boundary inside PricingPanel.
Orchestrate page.tsx to pre-render the landing page framework.

phase.name: Dynamic Core Integration
phase.action: Create the memoized usePricingMatrix calculation hook.
Wire rate multipliers resolving inside ExchangeRateProvider.
Connect PricingPanel state variables to PricingCard presentation text nodes.
Integrate mobile menu toggle logic and body scroll-lock hooks.

phase.name: Motion & Accessibility fine-tuning
phase.action: Define hardware-accelerated animations classes (@keyframes heroReveal).
Setup IntersectionObserver scroll reveal utilities.
Bind 3D cursor listeners inside BentoCard coordinates updates.
Setup prefers-reduced-motion media query variables overrides.
Embed JSON-LD metadata scripts inside the page header.

gateway.name: Compilation Check (Post-Phase 2)
gateway.action: Run npm run build. Compilation must succeed without type or syntax errors.
Verify global design token variables are successfully loaded in layout contexts.

gateway.name: Static Layout Stability Audit (Post-Phase 4)
gateway.action: Inspect rendering with browser JS disabled. Core content, headlines, grids, and USD prices must render correctly.

gateway.name: State Isolation Verification (Post-Phase 5)
gateway.action: Record render cycles using React DevTools. Selector toggles must trigger exactly zero renders on sibling modules.

gateway.name: Accessibility & Focus Audit (Post-Phase 6)
gateway.action: Run axe-core checks to verify a perfect 100 accessibility rating.
Verify page traversal works using keyboard tab controls.

instruction.pre_launch_checklist: <item id="3" check="Core Web Vitals scores: LCP < 1.5s, CLS < 0.01, INP < 80ms under simulated network throttling." />
